title: melothria velutina
intro: Melothria velutina, also known as the gac fruit or white gourd, is a type of tropical vine that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of melothria velutina include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and aid in the management of diabetes and obesity. Herbal preparations of melothria velutina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
